payload.answer: This looks like a duplicate: both memories say that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans. Safe actions available are: link_duplicate to treat the new item as a duplicate of the existing memory, keep_existing to retain only the existing memory, add_anyway to store the new wording as a separate memory, edit to revise the new memory before saving, or cancel to make no change.
